headline: Saka back in full training — derby boost
summary: First full session since the hamstring. 14 goals already this season, and Arteta wants him starting.

headline: Arteta pushes Odegaard higher — more shots coming
summary: Captain moves into a free No.10 role, Jorginho anchoring. Points to Arsenal's highest xG setup of the season.

headline: Palmer a doubt, Chelsea scramble for creativity
summary: Cole Palmer missed Friday's session with a knock. Lose him and Chelsea's only consistent chance-maker walks out.

headline: Maresca goes full low-block away
summary: Five at the back, soak and counter. If it holds, we're in an Under 2.5 kind of game.

headline: Eze starts despite late international return
summary: Palace's only real spark back in from the off. Glasner has been desperate for goals — this is the lever.

headline: Bowen out for weeks — West Ham hollowed out up top
summary: Top scorer gone with a calf strain, no natural replacement. Goals get a lot harder to come by.

headline: Ancelotti hints Vinicius needs a rest
summary: Told reporters the Brazilian looked "fatigued" — could start on the bench. Rodrygo shifts central.

headline: Bernabeu run reaches 24 unbeaten
summary: Opponents averaging 0.6 goals per away game here this season. Low-scoring home win is the pattern.

headline: Lewandowski fit — and in form
summary: Cleared after missing midweek. Three goals in his last four home matches. Anytime scorer looks priced up.

headline: Simeone switches to diamond — Atletico go aggressive
summary: Higher line, more shots through Griezmann. Over 2.5 looking sharper than the book suggests.

headline: Nico Williams back from ban — Athletic get their spark
summary: Four assists in his last five starts. Athletic's creation numbers collapse without him on the pitch.

headline: Budimir doubtful — Osasuna blunt up top
summary: Main striker missed the final session with hamstring tightness. Without him, away goals dry up fast.

headline: Mitoma starts — Brighton's most direct runner back
summary: Rested midweek, fully fit now. Brighton score goals when he's on from the whistle.

headline: Lecce pack the box — compact 5-4-1 at home
summary: Averaging 1.4 conceded at home. They're setting up to frustrate — low-event, low-scoring feel.

headline: Kean leads the line — seven goals in nine
summary: Confirmed as lone striker. Fiorentina have been lethal away and he's been the reason why.

headline: Mallorca allergic to top-six opposition
summary: One win in the last 12 against La Liga's top half. Pattern points to goals-light, favourite-friendly.

headline: Hugo Duro out — Valencia have no plan B up top
summary: Thigh injury rules him out. No backup in form. Valencia anytime-scorer market is a minefield.

headline: Michel wants Girona 'on the front foot from minute one'
summary: High press from kick-off. Girona games have been chaotic early — first-half Over 1.5 a live angle.

headline: Isco back in — Betis look a different team with him
summary: Rested midweek, starts now. Betis's chance-creation numbers plummet when he sits.

headline: Elche leaky at home against the top half
summary: Conceded 2+ in six of the last eight at home against top-half sides. Over 2.5 has history on its side.
